nasb.text: Nevertheless I must journey on today and tomorrow and the next day; for it cannot be that a prophet would perish outside of Jerusalem.

esv.text: Nevertheless, I must go on my way today and tomorrow and the day following, for it cannot be that a prophet should perish away from Jerusalem.’

cnv.text: 然而，今天明天後天，我必須前行，因為先知不能在耶路撒冷以外喪命。

ccb.text: 无论如何，今天、明天和后天我必须继续前行，因为先知不能死在耶路撒冷以外的地方。

csbs.text: 不过今天、明天、后天，我必须往前走，因为先知不能在耶路撒冷之外被杀！
